creator: wojciech@sychut.pl
text:
ISO file on ftp.pl.freebsd.org seems to be damaged - it has the proper size of 729845760 bytes, but checksums mismatch from the corresponding "CHECKSUM" files. 
Downloads checked from 3 locations and FTP clients with the same results:

ftp://ftp.pl.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/ISO-IMAGES/10.3/FreeBSD-10.3-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso seems to have the following hashes:
SHA256: 237fbc9b68ebb3c655b3e0a27fbebeea45bee6b9286c41fc9f3c7d9bd1af543a  FreeBSD-10.3-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso
SHA512: aa5cedb78efcdceeff7722ef4ccb45339b56a461970abcc12f3b0d644d8bc393c031d6bced61e2f51657daa6c6b0b2e6d4a0deb9874a1fbb1962e0ea39675c69  FreeBSD-10.3-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso

Corresponding CHECKSUM files:
SHA256 (FreeBSD-10.3-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso) = fef068cf6dea26923ab84b62ba9f21461ca0bdec90a0741c8ffb0e1ca29e410d
SHA512 (FreeBSD-10.3-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso) = 8137966d9b62eb4bf597b047a8a43ae9f9a06f23ab7c812f229d32cbfab5bb0cc27089dcfb5d233e50a18620b75606e31ff01bb3084517746664b3b3c46c9d04
